items.title: Unit Tests
items.description: Property tests are unit tests where the input space is generated, not hand-picked.

items.title: Fixtures & Mocks
items.description: Property tests still use fixtures and may mock external collaborators; the new piece is the generated inputs.

items.title: Test Coverage
items.description: Generated inputs frequently exercise branches your example tests miss — branch coverage often jumps when PBT is added.

items.title: Integration Tests
items.description: PBT excels at pure functions; integration tests cover the wiring it can't see.

items.title: Strings
items.description: Hypothesis's `st.text()` is brutal on string-processing code — finds Unicode edge cases by default.
